params_snapshot._doc: CANONICAL CONFIG — single source of truth for rule values. Drift between this file and any prompt/code is a kill-switch event (premarket Step 1a enforces). When you change a value here, also change the embedded constant in the prompt that uses it (heartbeat.md, simulator_real.py, etc.). The pin check verifies they match next premarket.
params_snapshot.rule_version_notes: Premium stop tightened to -8% via micro-sweep (was v13b -10%). Sub-window stability confirmed: both halves of 53d window PASS 4-of-4 independently. NOT overfit. Findings: analysis/backtests/v14_iteration_findings.md
params_snapshot._heartbeat_section: Per-tick parameters consumed by automation/prompts/heartbeat.md and backtest/lib/{filters,orchestrator,simulator_real}.py. Operating principle 4: drift = sync immediately.
params_snapshot._exits_section: v14 ratified. Premium stop -8% (entry × 0.92). TP1 = chart-level OR +30% premium fallback (whichever first). After TP1: runner stop to breakeven. Runner exit per operating principle 11 tiered doctrine.
params_snapshot._entry_section: v11/v12 ratified. Asymmetric trigger requirement (bear ≥1, bull ≥2). Filter 9 vol_mult 0.7× (catches morning rejection bars). No entries before 10:00 ET, no entries 14:00-15:00 ET.
params_snapshot._vix_section: Two distinct VIX threshold ladders. (a) iv_regime bands (LOW/MID/HIGH) used by premarket for context tagging. (b) entry_thresholds used by heartbeat filters 8a/8b. Cache refresh logic in heartbeat refreshes when value within ±0.20 of any entry_threshold.
params_snapshot._sizing_section: v13b quality-tiered. ELITE = trigger set includes confluence OR sequence_rejection/reclaim. BASE = otherwise. $0-$2k tier skips quality scaling (capital constraint).

position_sizing_tiers.structure: 2 TP1 + 1 conservative runner (no upsize — capital constraint)

params_snapshot._risk_section: Hard caps from risk-rules.md. Daily kill switch + per-trade risk. By construction one max-loss = day done.
params_snapshot._first_entry_rule_section: Added 2026-05-08. If a setup name has been entered AND stopped out today, no second entry on that setup name today. Was in risk-rules.md doctrine, not in heartbeat code. Now both (sync).
params_snapshot._macro_section: Macro Bias Inheritance v2 — HARD VETO if event ≤ 120 min ahead AND counter-trend to today-bias.bias. SOFT MODIFIER 120-240 min raises bull threshold to ≥10/11, lowers bear to ≥7/10.
params_snapshot._calendar_freshness_section: Premarket Step 1b checks macro-calendar.json#refresh_log[] last entry. > 7 days = stale, surface as journal warning. Sunday weekly-review owns the actual 30-day fetch.
params_snapshot._liquidity_gate_section: Pre-entry liquidity check on candidate strike. Hard rejections per risk-rules.md.
params_snapshot._catalyst_section: Catalyst-awareness flags. Set true to graduate from journal-only to filter-active. Default: aware-only.
params_snapshot._dealer_section: Options dealer levels are written to key-levels.json as Liquidity tier; heartbeat treats them like any other level (price, distance) — no special dealer-aware logic. Set true to start tagging dealer-level interactions in journal.
params_snapshot._liquidity_tier_section: Volume Profile / AVWAP shelves are added to key-levels.json by premarket. Heartbeat treats them like any other level. No flag needed — Pine indicator availability is the only gate.
params_snapshot._dark_pool_section: EOD aggregates yesterday's TRF block prints into Liquidity tier for tomorrow. Set false to disable the EOD step (e.g., if Alpaca rate-limits trade pulls).
params_snapshot._session_timing_section: Task Scheduler trigger times. Used by automation/morning-kickoff.md and setup/install-tasks.ps1.
params_snapshot._resilience_section: Self-healing harness invariants. Kept here for visibility — actual values are also embedded in _shared.ps1 (drift between the two = bug to fix).
